name: Black Forest Brownies a La Mode
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine brownie mix, cherry pie filling, oil, and egg whites.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes in the preheated oven.
6. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
7. Spread when melted.
